title: Steel Production Ex-China Returns To Contraction
section_path: Steel Production Ex-China Returns To Contraction
section_path_text: Steel Production Ex-China Returns To Contraction
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, global steel production totaled approximately 141.8 million tons in February. This is down month-on-month by 5.5 million tons (-4%) and is down year-on-year by 2.9 million tons (-2%). Steel production ex-China totaled approximately 65.7 million tons.
